How a reporting rebuild returned 10 developer hours a week.

Live dashboards replaced recurring custom report requests and gave the wider team direct visibility into performance.

The challenge

Every reporting question became a developer interruption. The business had data, but no practical operating visibility.

The approach

  • Identified repeated report requests and their real decision purpose.
  • Rebuilt the reporting layer around live dashboards.
  • Gave nontechnical users a way to answer normal questions without filing requests.

The result

10 developer hours returned each week.

Anonymized artifact

01Source data
02Clean model
03Dashboard
04Weekly readout
05Exception
10 developer hours returned each week
Manual asks-74%
FreshnessDaily
OwnerOps
